title: Commercial Appraiser
description: Johnson & Johnson is seeking a Commercial Appraiser to assess property value for our real estate portfolio. You'll conduct appraisals, research market conditions, and develop valuation reports. Work remotely for a diversified healthcare company managing a global portfolio of facilities.
responsibilities: Conduct commercial property appraisals following industry standards
Research market conditions and comparable property sales
Analyze property characteristics and prepare valuation reports
Maintain current knowledge of real estate laws and regulations
Document findings and support property transactions

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, or Real Estate

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
